name: DAT Solutions Freight Data & Load Board API
what_it_does: DAT Solutions REST API for freight market data and load board platform. Enables AI agents to manage load posting and carrier matching, access real-time spot market rate data, retrieve freight market intelligence and lane analytics, handle carrier search and authority verification, access rate trends and rate forecasting data, manage capacity and availability data, retrieve fuel surcharge and accessorial rate data, handle equipment type and location-based search, and integrate freight market data with TMS, pricing engines, and analytics platforms.
use_cases: Accessing real-time freight spot rates from pricing automation agents
Managing load board postings from freight brokerage automation agents
Retrieving freight lane analytics from logistics intelligence agents
Integrating market rate data with TMS pricing from transportation management agents
not_for: International freight without US and North American truckload market focus
LTL pricing without FTL and truckload spot market data needs
Non-freight logistics without trucking-specific market intelligence
best_when: A freight broker, shipper, carrier, or TMS provider using DAT wants AI agents to automate spot rate intelligence, load matching, carrier search, lane analytics, and market pricing data integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Rate data is used for real financial pricing decisions — automated rate acceptance must have approval workflow. Market data licensing restricts redistribution. Carrier authority verification is legally critical — tendering to invalid carriers creates liability.

auth.notes: DAT uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with load board, rates, and analytics scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. No webhooks — polling for rate and market updates. Data licensing agreement required for commercial rate data use.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — freight data subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription; API access requires higher-tier plans or separate data licensing
pricing.notes: Beaverton, Oregon. Founded 1978. Market leader for North American freight market data. 1M+ loads and trucks posted daily. DAT RateView is the standard for freight spot market pricing. Acquired by Roper Technologies (NYSE: ROP) 2004. 183,000+ carriers and brokers. Competes with Truckstop for load board and rate data. Rate data cited in TMS pricing models industry-wide.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Rate data informs real pricing decisions — automated rate acceptance must have approval workflow
Data redistribution licensing — DAT rate data cannot be redistributed without commercial licensing agreement
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
No webhooks — polling required for rate updates; high-frequency polling increases costs
Carrier authority verification is critical — never automate load tendering without valid FMCSA authority check
Roper Technologies ownership — stable enterprise company with long-term data product
agent_readiness.security_notes: Freight rate and market data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Rate data redistribution licensing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Freight market data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Rate data licensing restrictions.
